info.name: Mail Service API
info.description: API collection for Mail Service - Email management with Excel import

request.description: Upload an Excel file containing email data. The file should have headers matching the Email entity fields. Extra columns will be ignored.

body.raw:
[
  {
    "firstName": "John",
    "lastName": "Doe",
    "email": "john.doe@example.com",
    "emailStatus": "VERIFIED",
    "jobTitle": "Software Engineer",
    "companyName": "Tech Corp",
    "companyDomain": "techcorp.com",
    "location": "New York, USA"
  },
  {
    "firstName": "Jane",
    "lastName": "Smith",
    "email": "jane.smith@example.com",
    "emailStatus": "UNVERIFIED",
    "jobTitle": "Product Manager",
    "companyName": "Innovation Inc",
    "companyDomain": "innovation.com",
    "location": "San Francisco, USA"
  }
]

request.description: Add emails directly via JSON payload. Extra fields in the request will be ignored.

item.name: Add Single Email with Extra Fields

body.raw:
[
  {
    "firstName": "Bob",
    "lastName": "Johnson",
    "email": "bob.johnson@startup.io",
    "emailStatus": "VERIFIED",
    "jobTitle": "CTO",
    "companyName": "Startup IO",
    "companyDomain": "startup.io",
    "location": "Austin, USA",
    "phoneNumber": "555-1234",
    "notes": "This field will be ignored",
    "customField": "This will also be ignored"
  }
]

request.description: Example showing that extra fields (phoneNumber, notes, customField) are ignored during processing.
Check the status of an async transaction using the TID returned from import-excel or add endpoints.
Get the first page of emails with default page size (10 records). Returns paginated response with metadata including total pages, total elements, and navigation flags.

item.name: Get Email List - Custom Page Size

request.description: Get emails with custom page size. Useful for displaying more records per page.

query.description: Page number (0-indexed, so page 2 is the 3rd page)

request.description: Get a specific page of emails. Page numbers are 0-indexed (page 0 is the first page).

item.name: Get Email List - Large Page Size

query.description: Larger page size for bulk viewing (max: 100)

request.description: Get emails with a larger page size. Maximum allowed is 100 records per page to prevent performance issues.
